title: Write an ArgoCD Application Manifest
description: Create an ArgoCD Application that syncs a Kubernetes app from a Git repository with automated sync, pruning, and self-healing enabled.
starterCode:
# Write an ArgoCD Application manifest
# Requirements:
# 1. Kind: Application, apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
# 2. Name: webapp, namespace: argocd
# 3. Source: https://github.com/example/webapp-config, branch HEAD, path: k8s/production
# 4. Destination: default cluster (https://kubernetes.default.svc), namespace: webapp
# 5. Automated sync with prune: true and selfHeal: true
# 6. syncOptions: CreateNamespace=true
apiVersion:
kind:
metadata:
  # Add name and namespace
spec:
  project: default
  source:
    # Add repoURL, targetRevision, path
  destination:
    # Add server and namespace
  syncPolicy:
    # Add automated sync config
solutionCode:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: webapp
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  project: default
  source:
    repoURL: https://github.com/example/webapp-config
    targetRevision: HEAD
    path: k8s/production
  destination:
    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
    namespace: webapp
  syncPolicy:
    automated:
      prune: true
      selfHeal: true
    syncOptions:
      - CreateNamespace=true
hints: ArgoCD resources always go in the 'argocd' namespace
targetRevision: HEAD tracks the default branch tip
prune: true removes resources deleted from Git; selfHeal: true fixes manual cluster changes
CreateNamespace=true in syncOptions auto-creates the target namespace

validationRules.errorMessage: ArgoCD Application must be in the argocd namespace
Enable prune: true to remove deleted resources
Enable selfHeal: true to fix manual changes

simulatedOutput.success:
argocd app create --upsert -f application.yaml
application 'webapp' created

argocd app sync webapp
SYNC    webapp  Synced  Healthy

RESOURCES:
Deployment/webapp   Synced  Healthy
Service/webapp      Synced  Healthy
Namespace/webapp    Synced

GitOps sync successful! App is tracking main branch.
simulatedOutput.failure: Error: invalid Application manifest. Check apiVersion (argoproj.io/v1alpha1), namespace (argocd), and syncPolicy structure.
